Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase superfamily. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=(+)-kolavelool + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = (+)-O-methylkolavelool + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:55968, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:138313, ChEBI:CHEBI:139480; EC=2.1.1.347; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:25694050}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:55969; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:25694050};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the biosynthesis of the diterpene (+)-O-methylkolavelool (PubMed:25694050). Catalyzes the transfer of a methyl group from S-adenosyl-L-methionine to the hydroxy group of (+)-kolavelool, forming (+)-O-methylkolavelool (PubMed:25694050). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:25694050}.
